pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to multiple reentrancy vulnerabilities found in external calls and fee distribution functions. SWC-107 is justified as the contract lacks proper access controls, with privileged functions missing the onlyOwner modifier. Evidence: Critical reentrancy in sendETHToDevelopment function transferring ETH before state updates; lockTheSwap modifier ineffective for cross-function reentrancy prevention; Multiple privileged functions missing onlyOwner modifier per access control review

raw.pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to multiple reentrancy vulnerabilities found in external calls and fee distribution functions. SWC-107 is justified as the contract lacks proper access controls, with privileged functions missing the onlyOwner modifier. Evidence: Critical reentrancy in sendETHToDevelopment function transferring ETH before state updates; lockTheSwap modifier ineffective for cross-function reentrancy prevention; Multiple privileged functions missing onlyOwner modifier per access control review
